case_title: PATEL, RAMANBHAI R. vs. PARKS, DANIEL et al

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PARKS, DANIEL
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
